name: Enriched Hand & Body Wash
for: For Normal, Oily, Combination Skin Types
description: A refreshing and nourishing wash that cleanses without stripping natural oils. Formulated with botanical extracts to leave your skin feeling soft and hydrated.

name: Nourishing Moisture Mask
description: An intensive moisture mask designed to rescue stressed skin. Infused with vitamins and nutrients to provide an instant glow and long-lasting hydration.

name: Mary & May Tranexamic Acid + Glutathione Eye Cream
for: All Skin Types, specifically for dark circles and dull under-eye area
description:
A cruelty-free eye cream enriched with 1,000ppm Tranexamic Acid and Glutathione to brighten dark circles and improve the appearance of freckles and blemishes around the eyes. This functional eye cream helps to hydrate the delicate eye area while preventing further pigmentation. Formulated with EWG green grade ingredients only, making it safe for sensitive skin.

The lightweight texture absorbs quickly without leaving a greasy residue, providing a refreshing finish for both morning and night routines.
benefitsList: Inhibits melanin production to prevent spots
Intense hydration for the delicate eye area
Hypoallergenic and EWG Green Grade ingredients
Fragrance-free and suitable for sensitive eyes

name: La Roche-Posay Anthelios UVMune 400 Invisible Fluid SPF50+
description:
The ultimate protection against ultra-long UVA rays with the new MEXORYL 400 filter. This fragrance-free fluid is ultra-resistant to water, sweat, and sand. Its invisible, non-greasy texture makes it perfect for daily use without leaving any white marks.

Tested under dermatological control on sensitive and reactive skin.
